name: Prancing Pony Inn Yard
description:
You are standing in the Inn Yard of The Prancing Pony.  This is where local
citizens and adventurers alike can have their horses and ponies fed, watered,
brushed, and generally tended.  To the west is the entrance to the Prancing
Pony, and to the south is the stable.  Off to the side is a small half door
behind which a stout man is working furiously on repairing the leather tack.
